title: Keep today’s guidance general
summary: A safety boundary for a reported major physical change.
guidance: A major physical change can make stronger personalization inappropriate. Stay with familiar, low-stakes routines and seek qualified advice for care decisions.
action: Keep your routine familiar and do not use this app to change medical care.
rationale: Selected because the major physical-change context activates the strongest safety boundary.

title: Choose one reliable anchor
summary: A small routine anchor for travel or a disrupted schedule.
guidance: Travel or a major schedule change can make the day harder to orient around. One familiar point is enough for today.
action: Choose one consistent meal, rest, or wake-time cue for today.
rationale: Selected because recent travel or a major schedule change was reported.

title: Make room for arrival
summary: A short transition prompt after travel or schedule change.
guidance: A brief pause can mark the transition into a changed place or schedule without requiring a new routine all at once.
action: Take five quiet minutes to identify the next necessary step.
rationale: Selected as an alternative transition prompt after reported travel or schedule change.

title: Choose one manageable priority
summary: A deliberately small focus during a significant life event.
guidance: When circumstances are demanding, a long list may be less useful than one clear priority and one pause.
action: Pick one necessary task and let the rest remain optional for now.
rationale: Selected because significant stress or a major life event was reported.

title: Set a clear stopping point
summary: A boundary prompt for a demanding period.
guidance: A visible stopping point can make a demanding day easier to contain without suggesting that one routine solves the underlying situation.
action: Choose when one task will end, even if other work remains.
rationale: Selected as an alternative manageable action after a major life event was reported.

title: Refresh your recent check-in
summary: Collect recent information before stronger personalization.
guidance: There is not enough recent information for the current-balance area, so a short check-in is the most useful next step.
rationale: Selected because current substantive coverage is below the coverage gate.

title: Notice what changed this week
summary: A second route into a recent check-in.
guidance: A dated check-in can preserve what you noticed without changing your long-term baseline answers.
action: Answer a few questions about the past seven days.
rationale: Selected as an alternative when recent-answer coverage is limited.

title: Begin with a deliberate pause
guidance: A brief pause can make the next step explicit without requiring a full morning routine.
action: Pause for two unhurried minutes and decide what matters first.
rationale: Selected for morning in the saved or browser time zone.

title: Choose one morning cue
summary: A familiar cue to orient the first part of the day.
guidance: One repeatable cue can be easier to notice than an ambitious list of habits.
action: Choose one familiar cue that marks the start of your day.
rationale: Selected as an alternative morning routine prompt.

title: Create a quieter transition
guidance: A clear transition can help separate the active part of the day from what comes next.
action: Choose one stopping point for work or errands this evening.
rationale: Selected for evening in the saved or browser time zone.

title: Set down one unfinished list
summary: An evening prompt that does not require finishing everything.
guidance: Naming what can wait may create a clearer edge to the day.
action: Write down one unfinished item and choose when to revisit it.
rationale: Selected as an alternative evening transition prompt.

title: Choose one steady point today
summary: A general routine anchor when no higher-priority context applies.
guidance: A familiar point in the day can provide structure without implying a personalized dosha result.
action: Pick one familiar time for your next pause or transition.
rationale: Selected from the general catalog because no higher-priority context matched.

title: Take a two-minute reset
summary: A short general pause that can fit into most days.
guidance: This prompt is intentionally small and does not rely on a dosha interpretation.
action: Step away from the current task for two quiet minutes.
rationale: Selected as a general low-stakes alternative.

title: Name the next transition
summary: Make one upcoming change of activity explicit.
guidance: Noticing an upcoming transition can make the day easier to navigate without adding a new obligation.
action: Name what you are finishing and what begins next.
rationale: Selected from the general transition catalog.

title: Keep the next meal familiar
guidance: When no ingredient-level safety system is available, the app can only suggest a food you already know and tolerate.
action: If useful, choose a familiar meal that fits your stated dietary pattern.
rationale: Selected only when allergy and exclusion fields are empty; it makes no ingredient or health claim.
